sections.paragraph:
verb לסלק

pay off, settle

verb סולק

be sent away, dismissed; be paid off, settled

verb להסתלק

to go away, leave, depart

verb להסליק

hide, put in a secret place (weapons, documents, etc.)

verb לסלק (>>סילק)

to send away, dismiss, remove

masculine noun

beet

noun

Salk, Jonah Salk (1914-95) , American virologist who developed the first successful polio vaccine against polio
